reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Tower chamber palette, art deco framing, light beam composition, and shadow contrast anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use ImageBundle for the authored frame art and blend it with dynamic beam geometry only while the Tab preview mode flag is active.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_light_path_preview_overlay_1920x1080.png through AssetServer during floor setup and toggle atlas frames with the preview mode state.
runtime_notes: Frame 0 is fully hidden guidance and frame 1 is the visible preview overlay.
Visible preview uses 50 percent alpha with clean yellow lane edges that align to the dynamic beam path.
Overlay must not cover HUD text or change input hit regions.

context.usage: Full screen guidance overlay toggled with Tab to preview beam routes and safe shadow lanes before the player commits to movement.

shape.silhouette: Full screen overlay with beam lane edges, target hit zones, and highlighted safe landing pockets drawn as clean translucent bands.

specs.texture: Clean translucent lanes with no grain and sharp corner markers for mirror targets.
specs.shading: Flat semi transparent fills with bright amber borders and pale white center glow.

acceptance_criteria: State sheet is exactly 3840x1080 px with two 1920x1080 frames.
Visible preview frame uses 50 percent alpha on beam bands and 35 percent alpha on safe landing pockets.
Legend corner remains within a 180x72 px box in the lower right without blocking the scale readout anchor zone.
